collection: Prompts Grok para vídeo de moda com imagem base

hooks.name: Passo e olhar
hooks.description: The subject begins at the original distance, makes brief natural eye contact with the camera, then takes one small step forward as if casually starting to show the outfit.

hooks.name: Virar e olhar
hooks.description: The subject starts with her head slightly turned away, then gently turns her face toward the camera, creating a natural attention hook before presenting the outfit.

hooks.name: Tocar no tecido
hooks.description: The subject immediately creates attention by lightly touching the upper-front area of the outfit that already exists in the image, as if showing fabric texture or fit.

hooks.name: Mão na cintura
hooks.description: The subject uses a subtle body-language hook: a small posture adjustment, one hand resting naturally on the waist and a soft shift of the hips.

hooks.name: Virar o corpo
hooks.description: The subject creates attention by slightly rotating her torso, naturally revealing the fit and silhouette of the outfit without posing aggressively.

hooks.name: Ajustar o cabelo
hooks.description: The subject starts the video with a casual self-adjustment gesture, lightly brushing hair backward near the side of the head before presenting the outfit.

hooks.name: Olhar roupa e câmera
hooks.description: Creates attention by making the subject briefly acknowledge the outfit before looking back at the viewer.

hooks.name: Ajustar os ombros
hooks.description: Captures attention through a realistic posture adjustment, like a person preparing to show the outfit naturally.

hooks.name: Passo e sorriso
hooks.description: Creates a natural approach hook without looking like a runway walk.

hooks.name: Ajustar a roupa
hooks.description: Uses a realistic clothing-adjustment gesture to catch attention while preserving the original outfit.

hooks.name: Mostrar de lado
hooks.description: Shows the fit of the outfit with a slight angle change, creating visual interest without a full turn.

hooks.name: Respirar e olhar
hooks.description: Creates a realistic human presence through small breathing motion and calm eye contact.

hooks.name: Levantar a mão
hooks.description: Catches attention through a hand movement that enters the viewer's focus without becoming distracting.

hooks.name: Recuar e avançar
hooks.description: Creates dynamic attention by using a very small natural distance change without zoom or camera movement.

hooks.name: Cabelo e roupa
hooks.description: Combines a realistic self-adjustment with a clothing presentation cue.

hooks.name: Perceber a câmera
hooks.description: Makes the subject feel alive by showing a tiny reaction as if she just noticed the camera recording.

hooks.name: Conferir a roupa
hooks.description: Creates attention by showing the subject briefly checking the fit and silhouette of the outfit.

hooks.name: Virar sem sorrir
hooks.description: Uses controlled body movement to create visual interest without relying on smiles or exaggerated gestures.

sequences.name: Aproximar e tocar
sequences.best_for: General clothing presentation, especially dresses, tops, sets and fitted outfits.

sequences.name: Ajustar cabelo e mostrar roupa
sequences.best_for: More feminine and natural lifestyle-style fashion videos.

sequences.name: Mostrar o caimento
sequences.best_for: Outfits where the fit, body shape, waistline or overall silhouette matters.

sequences.name: Mostrar a textura
sequences.best_for: Clothing with visible fabric texture, ribbed material, soft fabric, lace already existing in the original image, knitwear or detailed material.

sequences.name: Agir naturalmente
sequences.best_for: Making AI-generated women look more human and less staged.
